channels.notes: Richard's private channel. Always scan. Primary workspace for notes, reminders, and agent communication.
Global Paid Search team channel. Core team discussions, decisions, and status updates across all markets.
EU Paid Search channel. Covers DE, FR, IT, ES, UK markets. Key for weblab updates and EU-specific decisions.
Japan Paid Search channel. JP market operations, OCI rollout tracking, and market-specific testing.
OCI (Offsite Customer Interactions) channel. Cross-market OCI rollout status, Google MCC access, and partner coordination.
Brandon's team channel. Team-wide announcements, org updates, and cross-functional coordination. Manager messages always high-relevance.
ABIX (Amazon Business Intelligence Exchange) Paid Search channel. Data and analytics discussions for PS team.
Baloo search engine and MCS (Managed Campaign Service) discussions. Watch for redirect expansion and search algorithm changes.
MCS-PS redirect expansion project channel. Track redirect rollout progress and PS integration milestones.
External vendor channel with AppTweak. App store optimization and competitive intelligence. Lower frequency scan.
CPS (Channel Partnership Solutions) channel. Partnership discussions and cross-channel coordination. Lower frequency scan.
